title: Multi-change diff: one breaking, one cosmetic
raw_changelog: Updated API endpoint with breaking change and cosmetic fixes.
before_text:
## List Items

GET  /v1/items

### Parameters
|  name  |  type  |
|---|---|
|  limit  |  integer (default: 50)  |
|  offset  |  integer  |

### Authentication
API Key via query parameter: ?api_key=xxx
after_text:
## List Items

GET /v1/items

### Parameters
| name | type |
|------|------|
| limit | integer (default: 25) |
| offset | integer |

### Authentication
API Key via Authorization header: Authorization: Bearer xxx

**Breaking:** Query parameter authentication removed. Use header-based auth.
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -1,12 +1,14 @@
 ## List Items
 
-GET  /v1/items
+GET /v1/items
 
 ### Parameters
-|  name  |  type  |
-|---|---|
-|  limit  |  integer (default: 50)  |
-|  offset  |  integer  |
+| name | type |
+|------|------|
+| limit | integer (default: 25) |
+| offset | integer |
 
 ### Authentication
-API Key via query parameter: ?api_key=xxx
+API Key via Authorization header: Authorization: Bearer xxx
+
+**Breaking:** Query parameter authentication removed. Use header-based auth.

ground_truth.breaking_reason: Authentication method changed from query parameter to header. Also default limit changed from 50 to 25.
ground_truth.action_required: Update authentication to use Authorization header instead of query parameter. Also check pagination - default limit reduced from 50 to 25.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Multiple changes: breaking auth change + default value change + cosmetic whitespace. Should identify breaking one.
